data.speaker: Bramble
data.text: Ah, a new Keeper. About time someone came to tend the soil.

data.speaker: Bramble
data.text: The earth here is special. Plant a crop seed and it'll grow right before your eyes.

data.speaker: Bramble
data.text: Shimmerwheat is the easiest to start with. Grows in about five minutes.

data.speaker: Bramble
data.text: Here — take these seeds. Find an empty patch and give it a try.
